find /workspace/files/ -type f -exec sha256sum {} + | \
awk '{
    hash = $1
    file = substr($0, index($0, $2))
    print hash, file
}' | \
sort | \
awk '
{
    hash = $1
    file = substr($0, index($0, $2))
    count[hash]++
    files[hash, count[hash]] = file
}
END {
    for (h in count) {
        if (count[h] > 1) {
            oldest_file = ""
            oldest_time = 0
            
            for (i = 1; i <= count[h]; i++) {
                f = files[h, i]
                cmd = "stat -c %Y \"" f "\""
                cmd | getline mtime
                close(cmd)
                
                if (oldest_file == "" || mtime < oldest_time) {
                    oldest_time = mtime
                    oldest_file = f
                }
            }
            
            for (i = 1; i <= count[h]; i++) {
                f = files[h, i]
                if (f != oldest_file) {
                    print f
                }
            }
        }
    }
}' | \
xargs -d '\n' rm
</solution>
